title: UFO Whistleblower Dave Grusch Reveals Why Military Personnel Came Forward
summary: Dave Grusch discusses how military personnel came forward to share their UAP experiences with him, including sightings of large triangular craft. He explains that these individuals had kept secrets for years and approached him because they wanted change and felt mistreated by the system.

key_claims.claim: Military members reported seeing large triangular craft, football field size, that hovered over them
Colleagues approached Grusch privately to inform him about programs he and his team were not getting access to
Military personnel came forward because they had kept secrets for years and wanted change
Whistleblowers felt limited in bringing people in, received harsh treatment, and lacked support
